name: Kreplach w/ Several Fillings
recipeInstructions:
1. Add salt to eggs, then add eggs to flour. Mix with hands until the dough leaves the bowl. It should be fairly stiff.
2. Knead dough until smooth and elastic.
3. Roll out on a lightly floured board or white cloth until paper thin (very thin).
4. Cut into 3-inch squares.
5. Place filling in center of each square, fold to make a triangle, and crimp edges with a fork.
6. Cook noodles in boiling water for about 10-12 minutes. Do not cook in soup.
- Chicken Filling: Cooked chicken (2 cups), minced onion, egg, salt, and pepper
- Chicken Liver Filling: Broiled chicken livers (2 cups), hard-boiled eggs, small minced onion, salt, pepper, schmaltz
- Meat Filling: Ground meat (2 cups), egg, minced onion, salt, pepper
- Cheese Filling: Cottage cheese (2 cups), matzo meal or bread crumbs, egg, minced onion, salt, pepper
NOTE: Serve with Chicken Noodle soup or as an appetizer/side dish. The Cheese Kreplach are usually served on the side with sour cream. Each recipe makes about 30; figure at least 3 each.
